Enumeration Case# kIONetworkFeatureTSOIPv6

macOS 10.12+

```
kIONetworkFeatureTSOIPv6 = 0x020
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1646638-anonymous/kionetworkfeaturetsoipv6#discussion)

Set this bit to advertise support for TCP/IPv6 segmentation offload.
